markdown:
## Title 43
### Chapter 484A
##### § 484A.215 — “Road” defined.

“Road” means the entire width between the boundary lines of every highway outside the territorial limits of a city and open to the use of the public for purposes of vehicular traffic.

subsections.text: “Road” means the entire width between the boundary lines of every highway outside the territorial limits of a city and open to the use of the public for purposes of vehicular traffic.
